triage_rows.direction: keep_the_outer orchestrator on the existing supervision plan when the orchestration-packet change signal remains stable
reconfigure_outer orchestration immediately when orchestration_mode_change or scheduler_loop_signal_mode_change flips state
update_outer supervision cadence when runtime_consumer_mode_change or sleep_strategy_change flips state

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the orchestration-facing packet.
An orchestrator can watch it to know whether orchestration behavior really changed without rereading the packet every cycle.
